query:
-- 为真实合伙人创建partners记录
-- 使用默认值：profitRatio=0, profitPaymentDay=25
INSERT INTO partners (userId, name, phone, profitRatio, profitPaymentDay, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name,
  u.phone,
  0.00 as profitRatio,
  25 as profitPaymentDay,
  1 as isActive,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM users u
WHERE u.id IN (15362146, 15372555, 16028821, 16800186, 16800523, 17370026)
  AND u.isActive = 1
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partners p 
    WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.isActive = 1
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute -- 为真实合伙人创建partners记录
-- 使用默认值：profitRatio=0, profitPaymentDay=25
INSERT INTO partners (userId, name, phone, profitRatio, profitPaymentDay, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name,
  u.phone,
  0.00 as profitRatio,
  25 as profitPaymentDay,
  1 as isActive,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM users u
WHERE u.id IN (15362146, 15372555, 16028821, 16800186, 16800523, 17370026)
  AND u.isActive = 1
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partners p 
    WHERE p.userId = u.id AND p.isActive = 1
  );
